news.paragraph: Traders should weigh the potential for volatility following the appointment of an interim Fed chair against conflicting macroeconomic signals. While seasonal tailwinds may support long-term Treasuries, a stronger-than-expected April jobs report could delay anticipated Fed rate cuts, impacting interest rate expectations.
